name: Kitchen & Cookware
description: Upgrade your kitchen with the best non-toxic cookware, pans, and cooking tools. Expert reviews of ceramic, stainless steel, and cast iron options.
longDescription: We tested 15 cookware brands for heat distribution, non-stick durability, ease of cleaning, and safety certifications. Our picks help you cook better with fewer chemicals.
